ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "language" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the tweet */,
  "client" INTEGER /* Reference to the client used to post the tweet */,
  "tweet_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" INTEGER /* Number of hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions in the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Topic category of the tweet */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location from where the tweet was posted */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media in the tweet (image, video, etc.) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media if present */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a reply */,
  "in_reply_to_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet ID if it is a reply */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for posting if the tweet is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_tweet_type FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_type") REFERENCES tweet_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES language_codes ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_client FOREIGN KEY ("client") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user follows */,
  "verified_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or device */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of the client (e.g., iPhone, Android) */,
  "client_version" TEXT /* Version of the client or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tweet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tweet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Popularity or trend score of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text of the mention */,
  "user_reference" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_reference FOREIGN KEY ("user_reference") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet has received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement metrics were recorded */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the tweet has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_codes" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language code */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code of the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO language code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
